W dobie, gdy rap sta≈Ç siƒô ≈Çatwo przyswajalnym produktem masowym, DGE wraca do korzeni. ‚ÄúUtwory rapowane, kt√≥rych mo≈ºna s≈Çuchaƒá w domu, w aucie, albo w jakim≈õ innym miejscu‚Äù to dwudziesta pierwsza p≈Çyta w dyskografii DZIADZIORA bezlito≈õnie diagnozujƒÖca spo≈Çeczne problemy XXI wieku. About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

snippet.description:
#RAFA≈Å‚Äã #TheRide‚Äã #Eurovision2021

Oficjalny teledysk do piosenki The Ride, kt√≥rƒÖ Rafa≈Ç Brzozowski wykona podczas Eurowizji 2021 reprezentujƒÖc Polskƒô! üáµüá±

Producent wykonawczy: Dorota Mr√≥z, Maja Frybes

-----

Tekst piosenki The Ride:

VERSE I
Lights, beating down a rainy street
All the faces that I meet,
tell me I‚Äôm wrong
Bright, starin‚Äô at the the neon signs
Makin‚Äô up a storyline
Got to hold on
(I‚Äôm) not lost, even in the dead of night
I can make it out alright
Just let me go
Yeah I, I will make it through somehow
Let me figure out what is in and out...

CHORUS
So baby hold on for the ride of your life
High above ground, livin‚Äô it loud
I‚Äôm gonna take it to the end of the line,
Takin‚Äô the fight, make it alright
It doesn‚Äôt matter if I stumble and fall
I‚Äôll make it through,
I‚Äôll never touch the ground
So baby hold on for the ride your of life
Hold on real tight, make it alright

VERSE II
Heart, I will give my heart and soul
I am going for the gold
No holding back
I‚Äôm gonna rise,
High up in the atmosphere,
I ain‚Äôt got no time to fear
Follow my tracks
Not lost, following the neon lights
Shooting‚Äô through the summer skies
Just let me go
Yeah I, I will make it through somehow
Let me figure out what is in and out...

CHORUS TAIL
I‚Äôm gonna take
on the world tonight
Not gonna ask
Gonna take what‚Äôs mine
So hold on tight
Baby let‚Äôs get high
High above the ground
Bright, starin‚Äô at the the neon signs
Let me figure out what is in and out...

it.title: Mercedes SI TROVA FINO ALLA FINE? Hanno venduto DEFECTIVE S 63 AMG - non rispettare la garanzia!
it.description:
Non ce lo aspettavamo! Mercedes-Benz sta ancora mentendo quando viene presa per mano!

Condividi il tuo video ove possibile. I problemi con la garanzia nel marchio considerato "premium" sono un fenomeno sempre pi√π frequente e dobbiamo combatterlo insieme.

Questo √® il sesto episodio in cui presentiamo una Mercedes del valore di quasi PLN 1.000.000 (300k EUR) - S 63 AMG Coup√©, venduta presso lo autosalone polacco Mercedes-Benz come nuovo, di propriet√Ý di nuovi prodotti un grave difetto associato al sistema di azionamento.

Il corso di questo caso mostra chiaramente l'approccio del produttore tedesco al cliente in Polonia, dove, a quanto pare, la garanzia per i nuovi veicoli rimane una questione di fantasia. In caso di difetti pi√π gravi, Mercedes-Benz cerca di vendere il cliente a tutti i costie trasferire ad esso i costi di riparazione nonostante la copertura teorica del veicolo
garanzia.

In questo materiale, iniziamo a esporre le truffe Mercedes-Benz presentate da del produttore tedesco sull'S 63 AMG difettoso, che abbiamo dettagliato documentato negli ultimi mesi.

Se hai anche gravi problemi con le auto Mercedes-Benz,
scrivici a: problemymercedes@gmail.com o a kontakt@problemymercedes.pl

Come risultato dell'enorme numero di applicazioni fino ad ora, √® stato creato anche il sito web sito web: www.problemymercedes.pl, dove puoi vedere i dettagli del nostro √® importante, ma soprattutto, segnala e descrivi il tuo problema con i veicoli e il servizio di Mercedes-Benz.

------------

de.title: Mercedes-Benz LIEGT ZUM ENDE? Hat S63 AMG f√ºr 300k EUR verkauft - respektieren die Garantie nicht!
de.description:
Das haben wir nicht erwartet! Mercedes-Benz liegt immer noch, wenn er von der Hand gefangen wird!

Teile dein Video wo immer m√∂glich! Probleme mit der Garantie in der Marke, die als "Premium" eingestuft wird, treten immer h√§ufiger auf, und wir m√ºssen sie gemeinsam bek√§mpfen!

Dies ist die sechste Folge, in der wir einen Mercedes im Wert von fast 1.000.000 PLN vorstellen - S 63 AMG Coup√©, verkauft im polnischen Mercedes-Benz H√§ndler wie NEU, im Besitz von neue Produkte ein schwerwiegender Defekt im Zusammenhang mit dem Antriebssystem.

Der Verlauf dieses Falles zeigt deutlich die Herangehensweise des deutschen Herstellers an den Kunden in Polen, wo, wie sich herausstellt, die Garantie f√ºr Neufahrzeuge eine fiktive Angelegenheit bleibt, und in
Bei schwerwiegenden M√§ngeln versucht Mercedes-Benz, den Kunden um jeden Preis zu verkaufen und geben Sie die Reparaturkosten trotz der theoretischen Abdeckung des Fahrzeugs weiter Garantie.

In diesem Material beginnen wir, die von Mercedes-Benz vorgestellten Betr√ºgereien aufzudecken des deutschen Herstellers auf dem fehlerhaften S 63 AMG, den wir detailliert beschrieben haben in den letzten Monaten dokumentiert.

Wenn Sie auch ernsthafte Probleme mit Mercedes-Benz Autos haben, Schreiben Sie uns an: problemymercedes@gmail.com oder kontakt@problemymercedes.pl.

Aufgrund der gro√üen Anzahl Ihrer bisherigen Anwendungen wurde auch die Website erstellt Website: www.problemymercedes.pl, wo Sie die Details unserer sehen k√∂nnen wichtig, aber vor allem, melden und beschreiben Sie Ihr Problem mit Fahrzeugen und Service von Mercedes-Benz.

en.title: Mercedes-Benz LIES TO THE END? Sold DEFECTIVE S 63 AMG for 250k EUR - does not respect warranty!
en.description:
We did not expect that! Mercedes-Benz is still lying even when caught red-handed! Share this video wherever you can! 

Problems with the warranty given by this brand (considered to be "premium") are an increasingly frequent phenomenon, and we must fight it together! In the 6th episode, we present a Mercedes worth nearly PLN 1,000,000 (300k EUR) - S 63 AMG Coupe, sold at the Polish Mercedes-Benz dealership as BRAND NEW, has a significant defect related to the drive system. 

The course of this case clearly shows the approach of the German manufacturer to the Polish customer. The warranty for new vehicles remains a fictional matter. In the case of more serious defects, Mercedes-Benz tries to pass on the repair costs to their client, despite the theoretical coverage of the vehicle warranty. In this video, we begin to expose the Mercedes-Benz scams, presented by the German manufacturer on the faulty S 63 AMG, which we have detailed documented over the last few months.

If you also have serious problems with Mercedes-Benz cars, email us at problemymercedes@gmail.com or kontakt@problemymercedes.pl. 

As a result of the huge number of your applications so far, the website has also been created website: www.problemymercedes.pl, where you can see the details of our case, but most of all, report and describe your problem with vehicles and service by Mercedes-Benz.

snippet.title: Glitterbomb Trap Catches Phone Scammer (who gets arrested)
snippet.description:
I glitterbombed my way up the scammer chain of command.  Come join me in my Creative Engineering class!! https://Monthly.com/MarkRober

If you suspect that you or a loved one has been the victim of fraud, you can call or visit the National Elder Fraud hotline (https://stopelderfraud.ovc.ojp.gov/)  at 833-372-8311 and report it to the FTC by visiting the agency‚Äôs website (https://reportfraud.ftc.gov/#/) or calling 877-382-4357.

Go watch Jim‚Äôs video to see how he located the scammers and subscribe to his channel-

snippet.title: LIVE: GRAMMY Awards Premiere Ceremony | March 14 at 3pm ET / 12pm PT
snippet.description:
Music‚Äôs Biggest Night kicks off with the Premiere Ceremony, featuring 8 special performances and more than 70 GRAMMYs awarded across music genres ranging from classical and jazz to R&B, Global music and more. 

Hosted by current three-time GRAMMY nominee Jhen√© Aiko, the Premiere Ceremony will feature a number of performances by current GRAMMY nominees, including: Nigerian singer, songwriter and rapper Burna Boy, jazz band Terri Lyne Carrington + Social Science, blues musician Jimmy "Duck" Holmes, classical pianist Igor Levit, Latin electropop musician Lido Pimienta, singer, songwriter and performance artist Poppy, and singer, songwriter and composer Rufus Wainwright. 

Kicking off the event will be a tribute performance celebrating the 50th anniversary of the classic Marvin Gaye track "Mercy, Mercy Me (The Ecology)". The special all-nominee ensemble performance will feature Afro-Peruvian Jazz Orchestra, Thana Alexa, John Beasley, Camilo, Regina Carter, Alexandre Desplat, Bebel Gilberto, Lupita Infante, Sarah Jarosz, Mykal Kilgore, Ledisi, Mariachi Sol de Mexico de Jose Hernandez, PJ Morton, Gregory Porter, Grace Potter, s√§je, Gustavo Santaolalla (Bajofondo), Anoushka Shankar, and Kamasi Washington. 

All of the Premiere Ceremony performers and the host are nominated this year, as are most of the presenters. Afro-Peruvian Jazz Orchestra for Best Latin Jazz Album (Tradiciones); Aiko for Album Of The Year (Chilombo), Best R&B Performance ("Lightning & Thunder" featuring John Legend) and Best Progressive R&B Album (Chilombo); Alexa for Best Jazz Vocal Album (Ona); Beasley with Somi With Frankfurt Radio Big Band for Best Jazz Vocal Album (Holy Room: Live At Alte Oper), Best Large Jazz Ensemble Album (MONK'estra Plays John Beasley), Best Arrangement, Instrumental or A Cappella ("Donna Lee") and Best Arrangement, Instrumentals and Vocals ("Asas Fechadas" with Maria Mendes); Burna Boy for Best Global Music Album (Twice As Tall); Burr for Best Comedy Album (Paper Tiger); Camilo for Best Latin Pop or Urban Album (Por Primera Vez); Carrington + Social Science for Best Jazz Instrumental Album (Waiting Game); Carter for Best Improvised Jazz Solo ("Pachamama"); Chika for Best New Artist; Desplat for Best Instrumental Composition ("Plumfield"); Gilberto for Best Global Music Album (Agora); Holmes for Best Traditional Blues Album (Cypress Grove); Infante for Best Regional Mexican Music Album (Including Tejano) (La Serenata); Jarosz for Best American Roots Song ("Hometown"), Best Americana Album (World On The Ground); Kilgore for Best Traditional R&B Performance ("Let Me Go"); Ledisi for Best Traditional R&B Performance ("Anything For You"); Levit for Best Classical Instrumental Solo (Beethoven: Complete Piano Sonatas); Mariachi Sol de Mexico de Jose Hernandez for Best Regional Mexican Music Album (Including Tejano) (Bailando Sones Y Huapangos Con Mariachi Sol De Mexico De Jose Hernandez); Morton for Best Gospel Album (Gospel According To PJ); Pimienta for Best Latin Rock or Alternative Album (Miss Colombia); Poppy for Best Metal Performance ("BLOODMONEY"); Porter for Best R&B Album (All Rise); Potter for Best Rock Performance ("Daylight"), Best Rock Album (Daylight); s√§je for Best Arrangement, Instruments and Vocals ("Desert Song"); Santaolalla with Bajofondo for Best Latin Rock or Alternative Album (Aura); Shankar for Best Global Music Album (Love Letters); Wainwright for Best Traditional Pop Vocal Album (Unfollow The Rules); and Washington for Best Score Soundtrack For Visual Media (Becoming).

snippet.title: "To Begin Again" - Ingrid Michaelson x ZAYN (Official Lyric Video)
snippet.description:
To Begin Again Merch Collection is here! https://shop.ingridmichaelson.com/

Lyric Video by Kelly Ford
Cover Illustration by Milkglass 

‚ÄúTo Begin Again‚Äù Ingrid Michaelson x ZAYN
Written by Ingrid Michaelson, Sarah Aarons and ZAYN
Produced by Sam de Jong
Mixed by Rob Kinelski
Mastered by Emily Lazar

Lyrics:
When the world was ending
I‚Äôd hold you in my arms
And we talked about the places we‚Äôd never been
When the world was ending
We‚Äôd hold on to the past
Because it‚Äôs all we thought that we would ever see
But then the sun came right back
And the birds sang as if nothing had happened

And, it‚Äôs alright
It‚Äôs ok
We will get
Another day
To begin again, to begin again, to begin again
I don‚Äôt know how
I don‚Äôt know why
But I know that I will try
To begin again, to begin again, to begin
To live and love and breathe again

When the world was ending
We looked up at the sky
And we talked about the last song that we‚Äôd play
So far from comprehending
They‚Äôd lift us to the stars
Never seen each other from so far away
But then the sun came right back
And the kids played as if nothing had happened

And, it‚Äôs alright
It‚Äôs ok
We will get
Another day
To begin again, to begin again, to begin again
I don‚Äôt know how
I don‚Äôt know why
But I know that I will try
To begin again, to begin again, to begin
To live and love and breathe again

And cry because I‚Äôm happy
And hold my friends like long lost lovers
Be kind to me and love each other
The world keeps spinning on

It‚Äôs alright
It‚Äôs ok
We will get another day
 
I don‚Äôt know how
I don‚Äôt know when
But I do know that we can
Try to begin again, to begin again
To begin to live and love and breathe again

snippet.title: Starship | SN10 | High-Altitude Flight Recap
snippet.description:
On March 3, Starship serial number 10 (SN10) completed SpaceX‚Äôs third high-altitude flight test of a Starship prototype as it successfully ascended, transitioned propellant, and reoriented itself for reentry and an active aerodynamic controlled descent. SN10‚Äôs Raptor engines reignited to perform the vehicle‚Äôs landing flip maneuver immediately before successfully touching down on the landing pad.

Test flights such as SN10‚Äôs are about improving our understanding and development of a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration interplanetary flights, and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.

snippet.title: GRAMMYs 2021: Harry Styles Sings Watermelon Sugar in ELECTRIFYING Performance
snippet.description:
Harry Styles can take a bow after his first award win and debut performance at the 63rd annual GRAMMY Awards, which aired on CBS. The 27-year-old singer won Best Pop Solo Performance for his song 'Watermelon Sugar,' which he performed live earlier in the broadcast. Harry's first GRAMMY win was met with applause from his fellow nominees, including Billie Eilish and Taylor Swift, who dated Harry in 2012.

#GRAMMYs2021

Exclusives from #ETonline :
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLQwITQ__CeH2Y_7g2xeiNDa0vQsROQQgv

snippet.title: Najlepsze kremy z SPF (przeciws≈Çoneczne) - Jaki wybraƒá?
snippet.description:
Lekkie, komfortowe, tanie, drogie, naturalne i dla cery trƒÖdzikowej ‚Äì najlepsze kremy przeciws≈Çoneczne dla ka≈ºdego!
‚ô•‚ô•‚ô•‚ô•‚ô•‚ô•‚ô•‚ô•Wiƒôcej informacji‚ô•‚ô•‚ô•‚ô•‚ô•‚ô•‚ô•‚ô•
Kremy z SPF powinny byƒá podstawƒÖ ka≈ºdej pielƒôgnacji. Wiem jednak jaka jest rzeczywisto≈õƒá i jak trudno jest dobraƒá odpowiedni produkt, szczeg√≥lnie przy wypryskach. Dlatego przygotowa≈Çam zestawienie r√≥≈ºnorodnych filtr√≥w tak, aby jak naj≈Çatwiej by≈Ço wybraƒá kosmetyk dla siebie. Kosmetologia bardzo szybko siƒô rozwija i na szczƒô≈õcie kosmetyki tego typu sƒÖ coraz lepsze.

Stosowanie krem√≥w przeciws≈Çonecznych nie tylko chroni nas przed szkodliwym promieniowaniem, ale i przed starzeniem sk√≥ry czy przebarwieniami, dlatego warto stosowaƒá je przez ca≈Çy rok.

Kremy z SPF sƒÖ tak≈ºe konieczne przy wszelkich kuracjach kwasami czy retinolem. W≈Ça≈õnie ze wzglƒôdu na tak wa≈ºne funkcje tych kosmetyk√≥w zdecydowa≈Çam siƒô na jak najwiƒôkszƒÖ r√≥≈ºnorodno≈õƒá i postawi≈Çam nie tylko na sk≈Çady, ale i na wygodƒô.

Postaram siƒô r√≥wnie≈º odpowiedzieƒá na pytania:
- Dlaczego filtry Purito sƒÖ niedostƒôpne? Dlaczego zosta≈Çy wycofane? (Drama Purito)

- Czy kremy przeciws≈Çoneczne trzeba reaplikowaƒá?

- Dlaczego filtry przenikajƒÖce sƒÖ kontrowersyjne?

W tym filmie znajdziecie kremy SPF:
- dla sk√≥ry trƒÖdzikowej
- lekkie

localized.title: Najlepsze kremy z SPF (przeciws≈Çoneczne) - Jaki wybraƒá?
localized.description:
Lekkie, komfortowe, tanie, drogie, naturalne i dla cery trƒÖdzikowej ‚Äì najlepsze kremy przeciws≈Çoneczne dla ka≈ºdego!

Kremy z SPF powinny byƒá podstawƒÖ ka≈ºdej pielƒôgnacji. Wiem jednak jaka jest rzeczywisto≈õƒá i jak trudno jest dobraƒá odpowiedni produkt, szczeg√≥lnie przy wypryskach. Dlatego przygotowa≈Çam zestawienie r√≥≈ºnorodnych filtr√≥w tak, aby jak naj≈Çatwiej by≈Ço wybraƒá kosmetyk dla siebie. Kosmetologia bardzo szybko siƒô rozwija i na szczƒô≈õcie kosmetyki tego typu sƒÖ coraz lepsze.

Stosowanie krem√≥w przeciws≈Çonecznych nie tylko chroni nas przed szkodliwym promieniowaniem, ale i przed starzeniem sk√≥ry czy przebarwieniami, dlatego warto stosowaƒá je przez ca≈Çy rok.

- Dlaczego filtry przenikajƒÖce sƒÖ kontrowersyjne?

W tym filmie znajdziecie kremy SPF:
